prompt: Find where the User class (or model) is defined in this repo. Output exactly one line: <file_path>:<line_number>. No other text.
Find where the Assessment class is primarily defined in this repo (the main model file, not test or subclass). Output exactly one line: <file_path>:<line_number>. No other text.
Count how many times the method `find_by` is called anywhere in this repo (any receiver, any args). Output a single integer count and nothing else.

Open the file app/models/assessment.rb (if it exists) and list the names of its top-level methods (def ... at class scope) as a JSON array. No method bodies, no other text.
